headline: Keysight’s ESA Win Highlights Shift Toward AI And Satellite Connectivity
summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) and Sateliot won the European Space Agency and GSMA Foundry Innovation Challenge for a blockchain enabled anomaly detection solution in 5G Non Terrestrial Networks. The project combines blockchain, AI, and machine learning to create secure, traceable monitoring across satellite and terrestrial 5G links. This recognition highlights efforts to support future 6G development and more reliable satellite terrestrial connectivity. For you as an investor, this...
